name: Peter's Pumpkin Pie (from Robt. Peters's Grandmother)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pumpkin, corn syrup, eggs, and evaporated milk in a bowl.
2. Stir butter into hot milk until melted.
3. In a separate bowl, mix brown sugar, cinnamon, ginger, clove, and salt until well blended.
4. Add the brown sugar mixture to the pumpkin mixture and stir until combined.
5. Pour the filling into the pie shell.
6. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Garnish with whipped cream topped with slivers of candied ginger.
